title: Senior Software Engineer - iCliniq - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - iCliniq - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
iCliniq invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About iCliniq:
iCliniq is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iCliniq!
